question: How do I sign up for the CRM?
answer: Go to the Al-Fardan Q9 landing page and click Sign Up on any of the four service cards (Custody, Staking, OTC Desk, or Lending). Fill in name, email, phone, and password. You'll receive a 6-digit OTP by email — enter it to verify. After verification you land on the dashboard for the service you picked. Before you can fund the account you'll need to complete KYC (passport + proof of address + selfie).
aliases: how to do it on your crm
how do i do it on your crm
how do i use your crm

question: How do I log in to my account?
answer: Go to the Al-Fardan Q9 portal at crm.alfardanq9.com (or your bookmarked URL) and click Sign In at the top right. Enter the email + password you used to register. If 2FA is enabled on your account, enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app. If you have problems, use Forgot Password to reset.

question: I forgot my password — how do I reset it?
answer: On the login page, click 'Forgot Password'. Enter your registered email. You'll receive a 6-digit OTP by email within 1-2 minutes (check spam if nothing arrives). Enter the OTP along with your new password — minimum 8 characters with at least one number and one symbol. Once confirmed, sign in with the new password.

question: How do I verify my email with the OTP?
answer: After signing up we send a 6-digit code to your email. Check your inbox (and spam folder) for 'Your Al-Fardan Q9 verification code'. Copy the 6 digits and paste them in the verify-email form. The code expires in 10 minutes — if it expires, click 'Resend code'. Once verified you're routed directly into your chosen service dashboard.

question: How do I complete KYC?
answer: From the dashboard click the KYC banner or go to Settings → KYC. Upload: (1) government-issued photo ID (passport or Emirates ID), (2) proof of address under 3 months old (utility bill or bank statement), and (3) a live selfie holding your ID. For corporate accounts also upload certificate of incorporation, UBO declaration, and board resolution. Review takes 2-4 business hours during UAE working days. You'll get an email when approved.

question: Where do I see my portfolio and balances?
answer: The Dashboard (home page after login) shows your total portfolio value in USD, a breakdown by asset, and 24h change. For a detailed view click 'Portfolio' in the main nav — that shows every asset you hold across all four services (Custody, Staking, OTC, Lending collateral) with amount, current USD value, and allocation percentage. The Wallets page shows the same data organised by service.

question: How do I deposit crypto?
answer: Go to the Wallets page and click 'Deposit' on the asset (BTC, ETH, SOL, USDT, USDC). You'll see a unique deposit address generated from your personal Fireblocks vault, plus a QR code. Send your crypto to that address from your external wallet — DO NOT send a different asset to the address or your funds could be lost. We auto-detect the incoming transfer and credit your account after 3 network confirmations (~30 minutes for BTC, ~5 minutes for ETH, ~1 minute for SOL).

question: How do I withdraw crypto?
answer: Go to the Wallets page and click 'Withdraw' next to the asset. Enter the destination address (make sure it matches the network — BTC to BTC address, ETH to ETH address, etc.), amount, and any memo/tag if required. Confirm with your 2FA code. The request goes to our admin queue for manual review (security check) — typical approval time is under 1 hour during UAE business hours. Once approved, Fireblocks broadcasts the transaction and you'll get an email with the tx hash.

question: How do I start staking?
answer: Step by step: (1) Log in and go to the Staking page from the main nav. (2) Pick the asset — ETH or SOL. Bitcoin does not support staking. (3) Enter the amount you want to stake (minimum 1 ETH or 1 SOL). (4) Review the projected APY and rewards schedule. (5) Click 'Stake Now' and confirm with 2FA. Your funds are delegated to our validator within 1 epoch (~6 minutes for ETH, ~2 days to finalise for SOL). Rewards start accruing immediately and are visible on your dashboard.

question: How do I unstake or exit a staking position?
answer: Go to the Staking page, find the active position, and click 'Unstake'. Enter the amount (you can partially unstake). Confirm with 2FA. Your funds enter the network unbonding period: ~27 hours for Ethereum, ~2 days for Solana. During unbonding no new rewards accrue but existing rewards are preserved. Once unbonding completes the assets automatically return to your custody vault — you can then withdraw or redeploy.

question: How do I see my staking rewards?
answer: Go to the Staking page. Each active position shows: amount staked, current APY, accumulated rewards (in crypto and USD), days since start, and next payout ETA. The Portfolio page also aggregates total rewards across all active positions. Rewards auto-compound for ETH — they increase your principal. For SOL, rewards are paid per epoch (~2 days) and show up as a separate line.

question: How do I apply for a loan?
answer: Step by step: (1) Go to the Lending page from main nav. (2) Click 'New Loan'. (3) Pick your collateral asset (BTC or ETH). (4) Enter the collateral amount. (5) Pick loan term (1 year, 3 years, or 5 years). (6) Pick LTV — we cap at 60%. (7) Pick your currency (USD, AED, or EUR). The calculator shows your credit limit and total cost. (8) Review + submit. Admin reviews within 24 hours. Once approved, you pledge the collateral to a Fireblocks multi-sig escrow, and we wire fiat to your IBAN within 24-48 hours.
aliases: how do i get a loan

question: How do I see my active loans?
answer: Go to the Lending page. Your active loans show: outstanding principal, currency, collateral amount + current LTV, next payment due, and days until maturity. Click any loan to see the full repayment schedule, collateral health (current LTV vs margin-call threshold), and history of payments made. The dashboard also shows a summary card with your total loan obligations.

question: How do I repay a loan?
answer: Go to the Lending page, click the active loan, click 'Repay'. You can repay: (1) monthly installment as scheduled, (2) partial early repayment, or (3) the full principal + accrued cost. Wire USD, AED, or EUR from your registered bank account to the IBAN shown. When we confirm receipt (same-day on UAE banks, T+1 on international), we release a corresponding portion of your collateral back to your custody vault. Full repayment = full collateral release within 24 hours.

question: How do I use the loan calculator?
answer: On the Lending page click 'Loan Calculator' (or start a New Loan — the calculator appears live as you enter values). Adjust the sliders: collateral amount, LTV %, term length, currency. The calculator instantly shows: credit amount you'll receive, monthly / yearly / total cost (Murabaha profit), effective annual rate, margin-call price, and liquidation price. Everything refreshes against live BTC/ETH prices. Use this to size a loan before committing.

question: How do I request an OTC quote?
answer: Go to the OTC Desk page (only visible if you have access — minimum institutional onboarding required). Click 'New Quote'. Select: side (buy or sell), asset (BTC / ETH / SOL / USDT / USDC), amount in asset OR notional in USD/AED/EUR. Our dealer sends back an indicative quote within 5-15 minutes during UAE business hours. Accept via voice confirmation or signed chat. Settlement is T+0 on crypto, T+1 on fiat.

question: How do I update my profile information?
answer: Go to Settings → Profile. You can edit: first name, last name, phone, and mailing address. Email is locked after verification — contact support to change it. Changes to phone or address require a fresh KYC document upload (the change triggers a compliance re-review, typically completes same-day).

question: How do I change my password?
answer: Go to Settings → Security → Change Password. Enter your current password, then your new password twice. The new password must be at least 8 characters with one number and one symbol. After saving, you'll be signed out of all other sessions (security measure) — you'll need to sign in again on any other device.

question: How do I enable 2FA / two-factor authentication?
answer: Go to Settings → Security → 2FA. Click 'Enable'. Scan the QR code with Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, Authy, or 1Password. Enter the 6-digit code the app shows you to confirm pairing. Once enabled, you'll be asked for the 6-digit code on every login and every withdrawal. We strongly recommend enabling 2FA — it's the single best protection against account takeover.

question: Where are my notifications?
answer: Click the bell icon at the top-right of any page. You'll see: deposit confirmations, withdrawal status updates, loan approval / margin-call alerts, staking reward payouts, KYC status changes, and admin messages. Unread notifications show a red dot on the bell. Notifications are also emailed to your registered address in real-time — check Settings → Preferences to pick which email notifications you want.

question: How do I see my transaction history?
answer: Go to Wallets → any asset → History tab. Shows every deposit, withdrawal, staking reward, loan disbursement, OTC settlement, and internal transfer with date, amount, status, and tx hash (for on-chain transactions). Click any row to see full details. You can filter by asset, type, and date range, and export as CSV for your records or accountant.

question: How do I download tax statements?
answer: Go to Settings → Statements. Pick the tax year and click Download. The PDF shows all taxable events (staking rewards, loan cost, OTC trades, fee payments) with dates and USD values at the time of the event. UAE residents typically have no personal tax on crypto, but your home-jurisdiction accountant may need this. We can also generate a bespoke statement for your accountant — contact support.

question: How do I contact support?
answer: Four ways: (1) This chatbot — I can answer most questions about the platform. (2) Email support@alfardanq9.com — typical response under 2 business hours. (3) The in-app support ticket in Settings → Support — goes directly to our on-desk team. (4) Phone +971-4-xxx-xxxx during UAE business hours (Sun-Thu 9am-6pm GST). For urgent issues (suspected account compromise) call the phone line.

question: How do I navigate the CRM — what's in the main menu?
answer: Main menu (left sidebar or top nav): Dashboard (overview + portfolio summary), Wallets (deposit, withdraw, transaction history per asset), Staking (active positions + rewards), Lending (active loans + new loan), OTC (quote requests + trade history, if enabled), Portfolio (consolidated asset view), Notifications (bell icon), Settings (profile, security, preferences, statements). The chatbot (me!) floats at the bottom-right on every page.

question: How do I see my loan repayment schedule?
answer: Go to Lending → click the active loan → Repayment Schedule tab. Shows each scheduled payment with date, principal portion, cost portion, and running balance. For Murabaha structures the 'cost' is pre-computed at signing, so the schedule is fixed. Early repayments shrink the schedule proportionally — the cost for dates after repayment is waived.

question: How do I check my collateral health / LTV?
answer: Go to Lending → click the active loan → Collateral tab. Shows: collateral asset + amount, current price (refreshed every minute during market hours), current USD value, current LTV%, margin-call trigger (typically 80% LTV), liquidation trigger (typically 85%), and a visual health bar. Green = safe, yellow = approaching margin call, red = margin call triggered. Set up email alerts under Settings → Preferences.

question: How do I top up collateral on an active loan?
answer: If your LTV approaches the margin-call threshold, go to Lending → the affected loan → 'Top Up Collateral'. Enter the amount of BTC or ETH to add. The funds transfer from your custody vault into the loan escrow immediately, which drops your LTV back to a safe level. No fee for top-ups. You can also partially repay the loan instead — that also reduces LTV.

question: How do I switch between services (Custody / Staking / OTC / Lending)?
answer: All four services are available simultaneously once you have an active account — you don't need to switch. Each has a tab in the main navigation. The Dashboard shows a combined view. If a specific service (like OTC) isn't enabled for you yet, contact support to request access — some services require additional onboarding (institutional clients only for OTC, for example).

question: How do I whitelist a withdrawal address?
answer: Go to Settings → Security → Whitelisted Addresses. Click 'Add Address'. Enter: asset, address, label (e.g. 'Ledger hardware wallet'). Confirm with 2FA. The address enters a 24-hour cooldown — after that, withdrawals to that address process faster (no extra admin review beyond the standard Fireblocks check). You can whitelist up to 20 addresses per asset. Remove an address anytime from the same page.

question: How long do withdrawals take?
answer: Standard flow: you submit → admin approves (typically under 1 hour during UAE business hours, 9am-6pm Sun-Thu GST) → Fireblocks broadcasts the transaction → blockchain confirms. Total: usually 1-2 hours end-to-end for BTC/ETH during business hours. Off-hours withdrawals process the next business morning. Whitelisted addresses may skip the admin queue and process in minutes. Large withdrawals (>$100K equivalent) may have additional compliance review up to 24 hours.
aliases: when will i get my funds

question: How long do deposits take?
answer: Depends on the asset and the network: BTC auto-credits after 3 confirmations (~30 minutes), ETH after 3 confirmations (~3-5 minutes), SOL after 1 confirmation (~30 seconds to 1 minute), USDT/USDC on Ethereum ~5 minutes, USDT/USDC on Tron ~2 minutes. You can see real-time progress on the Wallets page — the deposit shows 'pending (2/3 confirmations)' until complete. Once credited it counts toward your portfolio immediately.

question: How do I check my KYC status?
answer: Go to Settings → KYC. Status shows: Pending (we received your docs, reviewing), Approved (you're cleared — can fund + trade), Rejected (see reason + resubmit), Additional Info Required (click to see what's missing). You also get an email for every status change. If stuck for more than 4 UAE business hours, message support via the chatbot or support ticket.

question: Why can't I withdraw — what blocks withdrawals?
answer: Withdrawals can be blocked by: (1) KYC not yet approved. (2) 2FA disabled on your account (required for withdrawals). (3) Insufficient balance. (4) Active loan where the collateral includes the asset (collateral is locked). (5) Asset currently in a staking unbonding period. (6) Daily withdrawal limit reached (default $500K/day, can be raised for institutional accounts). (7) Compliance review for unusually large or fast-moving funds. The error message on the Withdraw page always states the specific reason.

question: Can I use Al-Fardan on mobile?
answer: Yes. The portal is fully responsive — works in any modern mobile browser (Safari on iOS, Chrome on Android). Deposit QR codes, 2FA prompts, and the chatbot all work on mobile. A dedicated iOS/Android native app is on our 2026 roadmap but not live yet. For the best experience on mobile: bookmark the site to your home screen (iOS: Share → Add to Home Screen).

question: How do I log out?
answer: Click your profile avatar at the top-right, then 'Sign Out'. This clears your session on the current device only. If you suspect account compromise, use 'Sign Out All Sessions' in Settings → Security — that force-ends every active session across every device. You'll need to sign in fresh on each device afterwards.
